review_title: Scaling Your Direct Bookings with Lodgify
description: I see Lodgify as a powerful "bridge" for hosts who want to move beyond just being an Airbnb or Booking.com listing and start building an independent brand. It’s an all-in-one property management system (PMS) that excels at professionalizing your business presence without requiring a degree in web development. For hosts like us who balance multiple properties and a growing team, it provides the essential "bird’s eye view" needed to keep operations running smoothly.
author: Jocelyn G.
pros: The Direct Booking Engine: This is Lodgify's "bread and butter." The website builder is incredibly intuitive, allowing you to create a professional-looking site that actually converts. It's a game-changer for avoiding high OTA (Online Travel Agency) fees and building a direct relationship with guests. Seamless Channel Management: The calendar synchronization is robust. It centralizes bookings from Airbnb, VRBO, and Booking.com effectively, which is crucial for preventing the nightmare of double bookings. Onboarding & Support: Unlike many tech platforms, Lodgify’s onboarding process is highly personalized. Having a dedicated specialist walk you through the setup especially when mapping different channels shortens the learning curve significantly.
cons: Website Customization Limits: While the website builder is easy to use, it does have its "ceilings." If you want a highly unique or complex design, the templates can feel a bit restrictive.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: At GaeaTeam, we manage vacation rentals along the Oregon Coast, and Lodgify has played a meaningful role in helping us grow from a hands-on hosting operation into a structured, professional management company. What we value most is clarity. With multiple properties, multiple channels, and a growing team, we need systems that reduce chaos — not add to it. Lodgify gives us a centralized dashboard where reservations, payments, guest communication, and reporting all live in one place. That organization allows us to focus on what matters most: delivering exceptional guest experiences. The direct booking website builder has been especially important for us. It’s allowed us to build and control our own brand presence rather than relying entirely on OTAs. For a company committed to long-term growth and independence, that matters. The integration with Airbnb, VRBO, and Booking.com has been reliable, and Stripe payments have been seamless. Once the system is properly configured, it becomes a dependable operational backbone. There is a learning curve, and some reporting tools could go deeper, but overall Lodgify has been a strong partner in helping us scale thoughtfully and professionally. For property managers who are serious about building a sustainable business — not just managing listings — Lodgify is a platform worth considering. GaeaTeam Seaside, Oregon
author: James S.
pros: The direct booking website builder has been especially important for us. It’s allowed us to build and control our own brand presence rather than relying entirely on OTAs.
cons: Lodgify's reporting tools could go deeper. Initial integration and setup has a bit of a learning curve.

review_title: Control without a steep learning curve.
description: Great customer service every time I have needed them, they have been super helpful, patient and kind. That is important to me today more than ever!
author: Dawn B.
pros: Streamlining the amount of work, it takes as a property manager, is what I was looking for. Lodgify allows multiple properties with customized pricing, guest communications and more. It has been pretty easy to use and what is not clear, they are happy to explain. This has been a great tool for me.
cons: Because messaging is in multiple places it takes me much longer than it should to know what I am working with. I think that process could be set up in a cleaner format.

description: Lodgify was sold as a complete solution, but the app simply doesn’t work. After 3 weeks, I still had no usable features, yet no refund was offered.
author: Alessandro G.
pros: Support team is polite, available and onboarding is thoroughly guided In theory, has the right integrations
cons: App is extremely slow and often unusable Vrbo sync still didn’t work after 21 days Booking.com connection took more than a week Channel manager sometimes doesn’t load on laptop neither Sales team oversells features (e.g., EFT payments possible, but not if you sync Vrbo) Refund refused (“cannot provide monetary compensations for every technical issue”), and onboarding took longer than the 14-day cool-off period, so I couldn’t even test before losing the right to a refund
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience as been a 9/10. Again, with the exception of a few minor reporting bugs and the lack of some (nice to have) features, Lodgify has delivered on all fronts. I would recommend (and have recomended) this PMS for anyone needing to manage their listings on multiple platforms.
author: Matt B.
pros: I have been using Lodgify (Pro) over the last year I have found it to be very useful in managing my two listings across Booking, VRBO, and Airbnb. Additionally, the website builder was also very easy to use and set up. The security of the site seems fairly standard with a 2FA option that I use. Customer support is very helpful with the option to chat or call, and the onboarding process was individualized. Payment for the platform is again fairly standard with the options to pay by month or by the year and the payments are auto drafted. All in all, I have found the platform to be a fair value for the money.
cons: I have noted a couple of bugs in some of the reporting tools that come with the Pro level subscription. most notably, when Lodgify records the number of nights book they are actually reporting on the number of days booked. This is def not the industry standard as we charge per night in most cases. I have reported the issue months back and it has not be corrected. This particular bug has a downstream effect on other reports such as ADR as well as others. One feature Lodgify does not support and I hope it does soon is the ability to include short videos to the website. This is particularly useful for property walkthroughs and for compelling landing pages.

review_title: Best way to setup a direct holiday rental website
description: Hugely successful. We get regular direct bookings. People often find us on Google maps after first finding us on Airbnb or Booking.com. We are now taking bookings for our second summer and even though it’s still only February we already have more bookings than last year. Around 50% of bookings come direct, saving a tonne of commission fees that would otherwise go to Airbnb and Booking.com
author: Nigel W.
pros: With Lodgify I was able to make a professional direct booking website for our gite in France. It synchs calendar availability with Airbnb and Booking.com. Very easy to use and I had my website ready to use within the trial period, making this a zero risk purchase decision. Lodgify made it easy to integrate with a secure payment processing service (Stripe). We use the automated price optimisation facility which gives me a lot of confidence that we are maximising both our daily price and occupancy. The AI help system is REMARKABLE! Virtually all questions I have had were quickly solved. And when I needed human tech support that has been quick and super helpful. Probably the best customer service I’ve ever had from a software company. Help articles on subjects like SEO have helped me further improve performance. Our property now ranks top for our main search criteria and we have direct bookings via Google maps.
cons: Integration with Vrbo was too difficult. But that has since been solved and in truth the technical problems were the fault of Vrbo whose technology stack is a hodgepodge of old systems held together with sticky tape, the result of years of acquisitions and cobbled together integration.

review_title: Great Support and Clean UI, After a Rough Onboarding
description: The onboarding experience was so-so and, honestly, pretty frustrating. I felt like I was handed off to customer support to figure things out instead of being guided through a clear process. The Vrbo integration was especially confusing, and Lodgify wasn’t very helpful there. Thankfully, I found a great contact at Vrbo who knew exactly how to set it up and helped me get everything working. Now that everything is running, the platform is much easier to use and quite powerful. The tech support team, in particular, has been fantastic—they’re responsive, proactive, and genuinely go out of their way to help, which is more than I can say for the onboarding experience. Overall, it’s a strong tool once you’re past the initial setup hurdles. I can see why many stay away given the onboarding process.
author: Julio H.
pros: The UI is intuitive and easy to navigate, and the customer service is truly top-notch. The tech support team goes above and beyond to help fix issues and make sure things work properly. Once everything is set up, managing listings and operations becomes very straightforward.
cons: Some of the workflows for the website and listings feel unintuitive. For example, I sometimes have to publish changes and then go back into the backend to undo or adjust things for them to properly reflect across platforms. It’s a bit of a workaround—odd, but it does work.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Professional Structure and Scalable Growth with Lodgify
description: Overall, my experience with Lodgify has been very positive — it has brought structure, automation, and professionalism to NamStay, making it easier to manage bookings across Airbnb and Booking.com, communicate efficiently with guests, and scale the business with confidence.
author: Johannes G.
pros: What I love most about Lodgify for NamStay is how it centralises everything into one professional system — syncing my Airbnb and Booking.com bookings, preventing double bookings, automating guest communication, and generating clean owner reports, while also giving me a branded direct-booking website that increases my margins and allows NamStay to scale without adding operational chaos.
cons: Subscription cost becomes more noticeable as I add properties, especially when I’m still scaling NamStay and watching margins closely.

description: I couldn’t fault it really! I’ve had a really great experience with the software and support team. The onboarding process was simple and easy and I don’t think I would ever change my software from Lodgify!
author: Chloe H.
pros: It’s so easy to use! And the support is just better than any other management software I have used in the past! I would recommend this software to anyone and everyone!
cons: It would be good for Lodgify to show the price of the payout we get on air bnb if that was ever possible - it currently shows the figure before air bnb commission and for accountancy reasons potential refunds it would make it easier to work out what’s is needed

review_title: Logdify a great opportunity for hostes
description: “A very good application with the ability to create a website for your property and have the booking management of your property.
author: katerina M.
pros: What I appreciate about Lodgify is having complete control over my property, without any commission charges from third-party platforms.It feels secure when using it.
cons: The fact that there isn't a lower charge when you are using some of the service provided through the platform.”

review_title: Great product, needs better customer service
author: Abbas K.
pros: Has a full suite of features and products for short term rental and property management. Using calendar and pricing is very easy.
cons: The customer service has decreased. Professional plans used to have phone access, but they quietly removed that and only retained it for the Ultimate plan.

review_title: A pleasure to work with your team - Luis was awesome!
description: It was a great experience. It was a pleasure to work with Luis. His customer support was perfect and very fluid.
author: Kolin B.
pros: The ability to unify multiple merchant platforms and create my own website for direct bookings. It was super easy to implement.
cons: The thing I enjoyed least was the messaging in the application. It seems as though all messages are marked as coming from me even when it's another user.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I am glad I chose Lodgify
author: Lisa G.
pros: I love how every lodging site is integrated
cons: Definitely a learning curve but the on board person, [sensitive content hidden], was wonderful and patient. I wish the program could collect credit card payment info without the guest making a deposit. It creates an extra bookkeeping step
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very happy with the functions, ease of use, and integrations with Air bnb and VRBO. I would recommend Lodgify to any other vacation rental owners.
author: Jason S.
pros: Ease of use and calendar. Ability to utilize the app on iphone and ipad. Visibility of customer payments made and remaining balances.
cons: The reports are only available with the premium subscription. Sometimes there is a delay in messages received from Air BnB customers.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I am new to self management of our short term rental and Lodgify has been instrumental with my current success.
author: Jo I.
pros: Intuitive, Very easy to understand and use. Excellent on-boarding and on-going support. Unlike other services that drop you after you have subscribed and paid for service. The customer support staff are very competent, knowledgeable and patient.
cons: The website development page can use some improvement by offering more options and AI assistance to improve your website.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have been so impressed with the support. From the minute, I signed up I have been helped along the way. If it’s something simple, I email and I get a response back usually in less than 12 hours. I also realize that some of the expense of the website with Lodgify would be offset by lower expenses from VRBO. I am very, very happy with my choice.
author: Suzan A.
pros: The support of the team has been amazing both via email and phone. And the on boarding to get my webpage up was really fantastic and the person who helped me with above and beyond. I am over the moon about my website.
cons: I would say the only downside has been that it changed how VRBO works. One thing that was a surprise was that I now collect the VRBO payments. I did have a stripe account already so that was a plus. And since I added on a Booking .com listing as well, the things I needed to do for VRBO were the same thing as I needed to do for Booking.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The Ideal All-in-One Platform for New and Growing Hosts
description: Overall, my experience with Lodgify has been very positive. As a newer host with just one property, I’ve found it to be extremely user-friendly and approachable without feeling overly complicated. It gives me exactly what I need to run things smoothly now, without being overwhelming. At the same time, I really appreciate that it’s built to scale. As I grow, I feel confident the platform can grow with me instead of needing to switch systems down the road. I also value the integrations with other services, like insurance, which help simplify the operational side of hosting and make everything feel more streamlined and professional.
author: REBECCA M.
pros: I absolutely love Lodgify. What makes it stand out is that it brings everything together into one unified platform, instead of juggling multiple systems. It makes managing listings across different channels so much easier and far more organized. I especially appreciate how simple it is to track everything in one place without feeling overwhelmed. The fact that it also includes my own direct booking website is a huge bonus and makes my business feel more professional while giving me more control. Overall, it has streamlined my workflow and made managing my rental so much easier. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a centralized, user-friendly solution. Also the customer service has been excellent
cons: Initial setup requires some upfront effort to connect all platforms and optimize settings. Once it's done it's great, but getting there takes time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great Experience in using the tool. Also when you have a question the support is great and follows up as agreed.
author: Martijn K.
pros: It is a simple to use product that does what it promises to do. Even when you only have one property, it is still very usefull.
cons: The propertymanagement environment is still a bit Messi, but still is improved constantly. I believe this will get better in coming releases.

description: My experience has been great so far, my property has more visibility and it easy to manage, i will argue it is good value for money the customer support has been great as well
author: Adeniyi A.
pros: The ease at which yoy can have your property liested on mamy platforms and onlmy y need to manage it from one
cons: Nothing to note at the moment, i will say continous improvement on the general user interface allowing for easier axcess to tools

description: I'm brand new to being a STR property owner and even before we closed on the duplex I knew I wanted to list my property on multiple OTA's and make my own direct booking site. I did my research and Lodgify was the solution I chose. Still getting to know the system!
author: Lea C.
pros: I find it easy to navigate around the platform and customer support has been extremely responsive. I need to dive into the website builder more in order to create a more interactive platform, but I'm glad Lodgify gives me that opportunity.
cons: Lag time exists on email correspondence I receive directly from airbnb to appear in the Lodgify system.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Why humans are an asset to Lodgify
description: My experience with Lodgify so far has been pleasant. The representative was succinct, detail-oriented, and did a wonderful job presenting information in a way that was easy to understand. They were patient, clear, and professional — a true asset to your company.
author: Mary B.
pros: What impressed me most about Lodgify was the representative I worked with. They were able to meet me exactly at the point I was at in the process, understand my situation, and then clearly explain and walk me step-by-step through to the point I needed to get to. That human ability to listen, adapt, and guide was what made me a customer today. No amount of automation, tutorials, or knowledge bases could have replaced the clarity and trust that came from that conversation.
cons: Nothing yet. My hope is that the type of personal, human-centered experience I had today translates into a long-term business relationship.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Good company , they respond fast . You can speak in your own language to a representative . Easy to use web builder .
author: Amanda P.
pros: Very easy to setup , you don’t need to be a web designer. Online help available . Preset themes makes things easy for a novice
cons: You are limited on what you can adjust on there preset web builder . It’s still good . Very useable , looks professional

description: Good customer service, the idea is good, but still has plenty of details to improve
author: Enrique C.
pros: Be able to operate all channels from a single platform
cons: That the sync with Booking is not available for "Booking Request" configuration and that the PM Modules and Reports available at Ultimate are not adding too much value.

review_title: Lodgify is better than I expected!! Highly recommend!
description: My overall experience with Lodgify has been better than I expected. For months, I researched various platforms such as Ownerrez, Hostaway, Hospitable, Uplisting, Guestsy, etc. I was extremely hesitant to move forward with any of them due to mixed customer feedback from all these platforms. I had a hard time finding a good source of truth. I finally decided to take the risk and try Lodgify based on all their features. Especially the website builder which I heard was amazing (this is what sealed the deal). I can say wholeheartedly that I have no regrets. I am very happy with my decision and would recommend Lodgify to others. I am extremely impressed with how fast I was up and running and their excellent customer support team. No matter when I call, someone always answers and is able to answer my question right away.
author: Keila I.
pros: There are so many things I like. For starters, their website builder was very easy to learn. Creating my first rental website was quick and if I ever got stuck I called customer support and they helped me right away. Integrating my OTAs to Lodgify was a seamless process (it did not cost a thing and the customer support was amazing). The customer support team set up time with me to ensure all my connections and information was working well. I was up and running in no time. Lastly, I can't say enough about the excellent customer support and service you can expect to receive from Lodgify. Whenever I have called with questions, they have been able to answer them. Their knowledge article base is very helpful. They make learning their system very easy.
cons: I wish their Professional plan included ability to set up various bank accounts for multiple properties. I had to upgrade to the Ultimate plan for this feature but Lodgify was kind enough to give me a big discount.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Meh. Nothing great to review. Just a bland platform with nonspecial bells or sparkles.
author: Sophia J.
pros: Ease of use and interactions with all of the booking sites.
cons: The added costs for nearly everything othet than absolute bare minimum for the software. Want a simple report..you have to pay more for that, want to see your payment history from a vendor...you have to pay more for that, want to see metrics...you have to pay more for that. For $500 a year..you get zero reports, zero insight, just a basic platform. At minimum we receieve no less than 2 emails about "upgrading our plan" additional hundreds for basic reporting functions that should be included as bare minimum in your software. Often with 3rd party sites..messages do not come over to Lodgify misisng valuable and important communication from guests.
